i18n.title: LicenceCheck
i18n.application.description: Application to verify electronic learner driver's licences.
i18n.application.organization.name: Federal Roads Office FEDRO
i18n.support.title: Support
i18n.verifier.home.title: Verify the validity of an electronic driving licence
i18n.verifier.home.title.old: Verify the validity of an electronic learner-driver permit
i18n.verifier.home.policy: I have read the privacy statement and terms of use and accept them.
i18n.verifier.home.confirm-policy.messag: Please read the privacy statement and terms of use, and accept them if you agree.
i18n.verifier.licence-type-selector.titl: Which licence would you like to verify?
i18n.verifier.licence-type-selector.aler: TODO: Please choose a licence type.
i18n.verifier.use-case-selector.elfa.des: Select how you would like to verify this electronic learner-driver permit.
i18n.verifier.use-cases.elfa-validity.in: Usually, verifying the validity is sufficient. For example, detailed information such as the date of birth is not necessary for an accompanying driver.
i18n.verifier.use-cases.elfa-all-data.de: Maximum check, for example, for creating a file for driving school admission
i18n.verifier.use-cases.elfa-all-data.in: In some cases, the validity alone is not enough. For example, detailed information such as the date of birth is required for police checks or driving school registration.
i18n.verifier.use-case-selector.mdl.desc: Select how you would like to verify this electronic driving licence.
i18n.verifier.use-cases.mdl-validity.inf: Usually, verifying the validity is sufficient. For example, detailed information such as the date of birth is not necessary for an accompanying driver.
i18n.verifier.use-cases.mdl-all-data.des: Maximum verification, e.g., for a vehicle rental or when lending your own vehicle to a third party.
i18n.verifier.use-cases.mdl-all-data.inf: In some cases, the validity alone is not sufficient. Additional personal details are required, for example, when renting a vehicle, or if a third party is allowed  to use your personal vehicle.
i18n.verifier.input-selection.mdlCategor: TODO: Kategorie BE - Personenwagen mit Anhänger
TODO: Kategorie C1E - Leichte Lastwagen mit Anhänger
TODO: Kategorie CE - Lastwagen mit Anhänger
TODO: Kategorie D1E - Kleinbusse mit Anhänger
TODO: Kategorie DE - Autobusse mit Anhänger
i18n.verifier.start-verification.title: Show the QR code to the person whose licence is to be verified. They can then scan the code with the swiyu-App and review your request.
i18n.verifier.verification-result.title: Verify validity
i18n.verifier.verification-result.reject: Your verification request has been rejected by the other person.
i18n.verifier.verification-result.timeou: The data transmission failed. The licence could not be verified. Please try a new QR code.
i18n.verifier.verification-result.invali: This learner-driver permit is not valid.
i18n.verifier.verification-result.premat: This learner-driver permit is only valid in the future.
i18n.exception.default: An error has occurred. Please try again later.
i18n.exception.technical: An unexpected technical error has occurred.
i18n.exception.image-handling: Invalid call. Please check your information and try again.
i18n.exception.file-storage: File system error. Please contact the administrator.
i18n.exception.file-mapping: Error loading verification methods. Please contact the administrator.
i18n.exception.use-case-not-found: Verification method not found. Please contact the administrator.
